revision.text: [[User:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{User|'''{{{1|Example}}}'''}}}}}]] ([[User talk:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|talk]][{{fullurl:User talk:{{{1|Example}}}|action=edit}}§ion=new +] '''·''' [[Special:Contributions/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|contribs]] '''·''' [[Special:DeletedContributions/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|deleted contribs]] '''·''' [{{fullurl:User:{{{1|Example}}}|action=edit}} tag] '''·''' [[Special:Blockip/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|block user]] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|page=User:{{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} block log] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:CheckUser|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/Case/{{SUBPAGENAME}}|&reason={{urlencode:[[{{FULLPAGENAME}}]]}}|}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/IP check|&reason={{urlencode:Vandalism or ban evasion; see [[Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/IP check]] and [[Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/IP check/Archive|archive]].}}|}}}} CheckUser]){{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: [[User:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{User|'''{{{1|Example}}}'''}}}}}]] ([[User talk:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|talk]][{{fullurl:User talk:{{{1|Example}}}|action=edit}}§ion=new +] '''·''' [[Special:Contributions/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|contribs]] '''·''' [[Special:DeletedContributions/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|deleted contribs]] '''·''' [{{fullurl:User:{{{1|Example}}}|action=edit}} tag] '''·''' [[Special:Blockip/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|block user]] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|page=User:{{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} block log] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:CheckUser|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/Case/{{SUBPAGENAME}}|&reason={{urlencode:[[{{FULLPAGENAME}}]]}}|}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/IP check|&reason={{urlencode:Vandalism or ban evasion; see [[Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/IP check]] and [[Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/IP check/Archive|archive]].}}|}}}} CheckUser]){{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: [[User:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{User|'''{{{1|Example}}}'''}}}}}]] ([[User talk:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|talk]][{{fullurl:User talk:{{{1|Example}}}|action=edit}}§ion=new +] '''·''' [[Special:Contributions/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|contribs]] '''·''' [[Special:DeletedContributions/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|deleted contribs]] '''·''' [{{fullurl:User:{{{1|Example}}}|action=edit}} tag] '''·''' [[Special:Blockip/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|block user]] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|page=User:{{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} block log] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:CheckUser|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/Case/{{SUBPAGENAME}}|&reason={{urlencode:[[{{FULLPAGENAME}}]]}}|}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/IP check|&reason={{urlencode:Vandalism or ban evasion; see [[Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/IP check]] and [[Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/IP check/Archive|archive]].}}|}}}} CheckUser]){{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: [[User:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{User|'''{{{1|Example}}}'''}}}}}]] ([[User talk:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|talk]][{{fullurl:User talk:{{{1|Example}}}|action=edit}}§ion=new +] '''·''' [[Special:Contributions/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|contribs]] '''·''' [[Special:DeletedContributions/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|deleted contribs]] '''·''' [{{fullurl:User:{{{1|Example}}}|action=edit}} tag] '''·''' [[Special:Blockip/{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}|block user]] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|page=User:{{urlencode:{{ucfirst:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}}}}} block log] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:CheckUser|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1|Example}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/Case/{{SUBPAGENAME}}|&reason={{urlencode:[[{{FULLPAGENAME}}]]}}|}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/IP check|&reason={{urlencode:Vandalism or ban evasion; see [[Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/IP check]] and [[Wikipedia:Requests for checkuser/IP check/Archive|archive]].}}|}}}} CheckUser]){{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
